title: galium lucidum var. corrudifolium
intro: Galium lucidum var. corrudifolium is a lesser-known variety of the Galium lucidum plant, also known as the 'Chinese Galium' or 'Galium', which is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Galium lucidum var. corrudifolium include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a tea or decoction, or it is used in combination with other herbs to create a formula for specific health conditions.
